---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement within the scope of the paper
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the scientific or engineering problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you evaluated and why you discarded them.

## Scope check

- [ ] This feature is within the scope of the published paper.
- [ ] This feature preserves deterministic pipeline behaviour.
- [ ] This feature will not break existing unit tests.

## Additional context

References, links, or screenshots.
